_comment: Zone polygons per camera. Keys MUST exactly match the camera_id in clips_manifest.json (a typo = the zone is silently ignored). Each zone: polygon=[[x,y],...] pixel coords on the (distorted) video frame; zone_type=SHELF|DISPLAY|BILLING|CONSULT; is_revenue_zone=true for product zones; is_queue_zone=true for the billing queue lane; is_staff_zone=true for behind-the-counter / backroom; zone_name=human label. Easiest way to fill this is the Calibration Studio (draw on a frame). Camera keys start empty.
